{{Quote|You WILL prepare to be boarded!|Baruche Sloane|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Baruche Sloane''' was a [[Gender/Legends|Male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] as a naval officer. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was made [[Fleet Commander/Legends|Fleet Commander]] of a small CSA [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] assigned to seize the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]], and commanded the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Enforce]]''.
